ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider information was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider offering the plan */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of virtualization technology used (e.g., OpenVZ, KVM) */,
  "ram" INTEGER /* Amount of RAM included in the plan */,
  "disk" INTEGER /* Amount of disk space included in the plan */,
  "ssd" INTEGER /* Whether the plan includes a pure SSD */,
  "bandwidth" INTEGER /* Amount of bandwidth included in the plan */,
  "ddos" INTEGER /* DDoS protection level */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plan */,
  "cpu_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores included in the plan */,
  "cpu_speed" REAL /* Speed of the CPU in GHz */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plan was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plan information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plans_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_locations" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plan at the specific location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plan location was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plan location information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan that supports the operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operating system was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operating system information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_systems_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
